subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having manifested unto Thy chosen ones that which was hidden from Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما اظهرت لاصفیائک ما احتجب عنه عبادک و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
